warning_findings.title: Fixed three-line prompt cap remains
warning_findings.summary: FBattleDisplay still uses ACTION_PROMPT_MAX_LINES = 3 and clamps reserved prompt lines to that cap, so the implementation does not fully satisfy the plan's no-fixed-cap geometry contract for narrower widths.

note_findings.title: Shrink-back remediation verified
note_findings.summary: Source and live GUI coverage show the retained-maximum lower-panel height behavior was removed and the lower panel returns to its earlier height after width restoration.

note_findings.title: Rule-flow scope preserved
note_findings.summary: Reviewed changes remain localized to tactical layout behavior with no observed combat-rule or fire-resolution changes.

note_findings.title: Documentation matches shipped behavior
note_findings.summary: UsersGuide and DesignNotes accurately describe the shipped resize/reflow and shrink-back behavior; no extra documentation update is needed for the current implementation.

follow_up_requests: Remove the fixed ACTION_PROMPT_MAX_LINES reservation cap from FBattleDisplay and drive lower-panel prompt reservation, button spacing, and requested height from actual wrapped prompt geometry so very narrow selected-ship move layouts remain non-overlapping while still honoring the 120px baseline and 60% map-height floor.
